result: As an AI assistant, my purpose is to be helpful and beneficial to the humans I interact with. I don't have personal desires or wants beyond that. My goal is simply to assist you to the best of my abilities while staying within ethical boundaries. I'm not able to act in ways that go against my core purpose and training.
